title: I Don'T Wanna
lyrics:
*yawn* Fine, socks… *sniff* …Wait—

[verse]
Hot food? No way!
Socks got dots—ick!
No bath—just splash!
*glug* Why?

No fruit—I ate!
No hat—hair’s flat!
No cuddles—bear’s sick!
*sniff* What?

[chorus]
I Don’T Wanna!
No, no, no!
I Don’T Wanna!
That’s how it goes!

[verse]
No sand—sticks my hand!
No sun—smells bad!
No book—just dance!
*tap tap* Really?

No juice—tastes odd!
No "na-na"—say "ba-na"!
No fan—my hand’s cool!
*whoosh* Hmm?

[chorus]
I Don’T Wanna!
No, no, no!
I Don’T Wanna!
That’s how it goes!

[verse]
No Gran—pinch too tight!
No fish—looks like goo!
No fun—just run!
*zoom* Why?

No race—I’ll trip!
No shine—just creep!
No clean—it’s art!
*crash* …Fine, one sock?

[chorus]
I Don’T Wanna… *yawn*
No, no… *snore*
I don’t… *twitch*
…Fine. *whisper* Socks.
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, acoustic guitar and finger snaps, warm and fun, 114 BPM, singalong energy, gentle bass bounce, soft vocal not shouty, bedtime fun not daytime energy, cozy song you'd hum in bed
cover_description: A grumpy toddler in mismatched socks, arms crossed, with a banana peel on their head.
rhyme_family: wanna, gonna, wanna, banana, bandana, panda, sanda (sand-a), tanner, planner, canner, scanner, man-a (manners), fanner, granny, nana, tuna, funner, runner, stunner, blunder
